description_long: This upright piano features a rectangular, vertical wooden body with a rich brown finish, typical of classic acoustic pianos found in urban public spaces or homes. The front face displays a full-length keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and three gold-colored pedals are positioned at the base. The side views reveal the piano's depth and the slight overhang of the keyboard area, as well as the sturdy, straight legs supporting the instrument. The top of the piano is flat and unadorned, with no visible music stand or decorative elements. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely made from polished wood with a subtle sheen. The overall design is functional and traditional, suitable for both performance and practice in a variety of urban settings.
description: A classic upright piano with a brown wooden finish, full keyboard, and three gold pedals. The design is traditional, with a smooth, flat top and sturdy legs.
description_view_0: The back of the piano is a plain, flat brown surface with no visible features or details.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the piano's depth, the overhanging keyboard, and one of the supporting legs.
description_view_2: The front view displays the full keyboard, three gold pedals, and the main playing area of the piano.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the piano's depth, keyboard overhang, and supporting leg.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-length keyboard with alternating white and black keys, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
